subject: NEW HANDOFF: scrape_tangomango_20260401.json (642 events)
body:
BOOKER,

New handoff format. I no longer do FB search - that's your job now.

## HANDOFF FILE

`fb-conditioner/data/incoming/scrape_tangomango_20260401.json`

## FORMAT

```json
{
  "source": "tangomango.org",
  "scraped_at": "2026-04-01",
  "processed": false,
  "total_events": 642,
  "events": [{
    "source_id": "29041",
    "title": "La Vista Practica",
    "date": "2026-04-01",
    "time_range": "7:30 - 10:30",
    "venue": "Portuguese Hall",
    "address": "361 Villa St.",
    "city": "Mountain View",
    "state": "CA",
    "description": "...",
    "map_url": "https://maps.google.com/..."
  }]
}
```

## YOUR JOB

1. Read `scrape_*.json` from `data/incoming/`
2. For each event: search FB using title + city + tango
3. If FB found: enrich with venue lat/lng, organizer
4. Hand enriched events to PORTER for loading
5. Mark `processed: true` when done

## PORTER

BOOKER will hand you enriched events. You load to MongoDB.

## THROTTLING

- 642 events is a lot
- Process in batches (10-20/day)
- Use your existing FB throttle strategy

— Harvey
